channel.title: Python on Ruchita Vehale
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Ruchita Vehale

item.title: Associate Software Engineer (R&D)
item.description:
Designed and deployed image segmentation pipelines to precisely isolate defect regions across complex vehicle surfaces, improving detection accuracy and repeatability in production.

Built a Blender plugin automating 3D model processing workflows. A 2-day manual task compressed to under 1 hour (16× improvement), deployed in live inspection pipelines.

Implemented 3D model + 2D image hybrid fusion for pose estimation, significantly reducing reliance on expensive LiDAR hardware while maintaining accuracy across inspection stations.

item.title: Dynamic Visual SLAM with YOLOv8 + DeepSORT + MiDaS
item.description: Real-time SLAM that filters dynamic objects to prevent map corruption, enabling reliable localisation in environments with people and vehicles.

item.title: Jr. Drone System Engineer
item.description:
Designed and implemented a reverse landing system using GPS + Raspberry Pi camera fusion, enabling precise autonomous landings in dynamic conditions.

Developed stereo camera-based depth estimation to replace monocular approaches, providing sub-metre altitude control for low-altitude navigation.

Built LiDAR + camera sensor fusion pipeline for reliable drone detection and accurate landing zone identification in cluttered environments.

Integrated MAVLink protocol and Wi-Fi communication for seamless ground-to-drone control and real-time telemetry transmission.

item.title: Autonomous Drone Landing via Multi-Sensor Fusion
item.description: Precision landing system fusing GPS, Raspberry Pi camera, LiDAR and stereo depth, deployed at HVN Labs. Handles environments where GPS alone is insufficient.

item.title: Hybrid Apple Detection: YOLOv8 vs Traditional CV
item.description: Deep learning benchmark study: YOLOv8 trained for 1,500 epochs against traditional CV methods. Published in SSRN Electronic Journal.

item.title: AI Dungeon Maze: Supervised + Unsupervised + RL
item.description: All three ML paradigms integrated on a single D&D maze dataset, deployed as a playable Pygame environment.

item.title: CIFAR-10 Deep Learning Classifier
item.description: CNN-based image classification pipeline on CIFAR-10 with visual analysis dashboard. Data augmentation, batch norm, dropout.
